text_block_list.text:
While walking down the hallway, I<n>hear
high-pitched laughter from the<n>studio, where a
dance lesson is being<n>held...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohoho! I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
At the upcoming ball, I'll showcase a<n>first-rate
dance worthy of the name<n>King!
HOLD IT!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: There's no ball like a masquerade,and that means masks! And thatmeans it's El time!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: El?! Where did you come fr—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Miss King... No, just King! I challenge<n>you to a
battle!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I swear on my Latina blood that my<n>dancing will
put you to shame!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Put me to shame? Why exactly are<n>you
challenging me, I wonder?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And to a dance battle, no less. I<n>assume that's
not your dancing<n>outfit.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This is my signature racewear,<n>y'know? The
muy caliente Condor<n>Brawler outfit.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho! Enough with your jesting. Go<n>and
clamber into a ring somewhere.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
My time is too precious for such<n>silliness. Now, if
you'll allow me to<n>continue with my lesson.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ladies compete not by combat, but<n>through
dance.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...Those were the words spoken by a<n>certain
first-rate individual when I had<n>a dance battle
with her.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Is... is that so?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I was dressed like this, and she hadnooo problem battling me.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Or should I say, she was secure<n>enough in her
first-rateness that she<n>could accept it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Secure... in her first-rateness?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But I guess I can't expect you to bethat secure, King.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And I always thought you were<n>first-rate... I'm
disappointed!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What?! Now, hold it right there!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Very well, I'll show you just how<n>secure in my
first-rateness I am!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ay! That's the way!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You there, come judge our battle! And<n>don't
freeze up when it comes time<n>to pick a winner!

Overwhelmed by her sheer intensity, I<n>nod in
agreement before I can help<n>myself

Classical and Latin music starts to<n>play
simultaneously as the dance<n>battle begins.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! I won't let you call me a snow<n>monkey
again!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea what you're alluding<n>to, but... you
just don't back down,<n>do you?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa and King Halo
text_block_list.text: TAKE THAAAT! HYAAAH!

The sun sets, but the two show no<n>signs of
stopping. I'm not sure how a<n>battle of waltz and
mambo could<n>come to a natural conclusion in the
first place...
There's only one way to wrap this<n>up!
There's only one way to wrap this<n>up!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Excuse me? What has gotten into<n>you?
choice_data_list: I suddenly got the urge to dance too!
I suddenly got the urge to dance too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Looks as if my passion has<n>ignited your
dancing spirit!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...King. I see now that you're worthy<n>of calling
yourself "first-rate."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! B-but of course! I suppose I<n>can
acknowledge that zeal of yours<n>as well.

The blistering dance battle comes to<n>an end with
the two dancers<n>acknowledging each other's
passion<n>for dance.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Damn right! Do you two have any<n>idea what time
it is?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
While I appreciate your enthusiasm,<n>please do
not cause me undue<n>concern.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Fuji!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
My deepest apologies. I'll return to<n>the dorm
right away.

And so the dance battle ends in a<n>draw as the
two dancers wobble<n>back to their respective
dorms,<n>accompanied by their dorm leaders.
